shaderCode: vec3 a=vec3(1,0,0),q,p=u_cameraPosition;vec2 centered_uv=FC.xy*2.-r;float rollAngle=u_cameraRoll;mat2 rollMat=mat2(cos(rollAngle),-sin(rollAngle),sin(rollAngle),cos(rollAngle));centered_uv=rollMat*centered_uv;vec3 v=vec3(centered_uv/slider_zoom,r.y);v=rotate3D(u_cameraRotation.y,a.yxy)*v;vec3 camRight=normalize(cross(a.yxy,v));v=rotate3D(slider_cameraXRotation+u_cameraRotation.x,camRight)*v;vec3 rd=normalize(v);float d,i,l,t_dist=0.;for(l=0.;l<slider_maxIterations;l++){q=p+rd*t_dist;vec2 g=floor(q.xz/25.);vec3 lq=q;lq.xz=mod(q.xz,25.)-12.5;float h=fract(sin(dot(g,vec2(12.9,78.2)))*437.5)*60.+10.;vec3 bq=abs(lq-vec3(0,h/2.,0))-vec3(6,h/2.,6);d=max(bq.x,max(bq.y,bq.z));vec3 aq=abs(lq-vec3(0,h+2.,0))-vec3(.2,2.,.2);d=min(d,max(aq.x,max(aq.y,aq.z)));d=min(d,-q.y);if(d<1e-3||t_dist>500.)break;t_dist+=d;}p+=rd*t_dist;if(t_dist<500.){if(p.y>1e-2){o.rgb=vec3(.1,.1,.15);vec3 wp=p;wp.y-=2.;if(mod(wp.y,4.)>2.&&(abs(mod(wp.x,3.))>1.||abs(mod(wp.z,3.))>1.)){if(fract(sin(dot(floor(wp.yy/4.)+floor(wp.xz/1.),vec2(12,78)))*437.)>.7)o.rgb+=vec3(1.,.8,.4)*2.;}float edge=smoothstep(.48,.5,max(abs(fract(p.x/12.)-.5),abs(fract(p.z/12.)-.5)));o.rgb+=vec3(.1,.2,.3)*edge;if(p.y>10.)o.rgb+=vec3(1,0,0)*smoothstep(.9,.95,sin(u_time*5.+p.y))*smoothstep(.2,0.,length(p.xz-floor(p.xz/25.)*25.-12.5));}else{o.rgb=vec3(.05);o.rgb+=vec3(.1)*smoothstep(.45,.5,max(abs(fract(p.x/25.)-.5),abs(fract(p.z/25.)-.5)));}}float fire=u_time-u_fireTime;if(fire>0.&&fire<.4){float beam=smoothstep(.02,.0,length(centered_uv/r.y))*smoothstep(.4,.0,fire);o.rgb+=vec3(0,1,1)*beam*20.;o.rgb+=vec3(1)*smoothstep(.1,.0,length(centered_uv/r.y))*smoothstep(.1,.0,fire)*5.;}vec3 sunDir=normalize(vec3(0.,slider_sunElevation,1.));float sunDot=max(0.,dot(rd,sunDir));vec3 sky=mix(vec3(.1,.05,.2),vec3(.05,.2,.5),clamp(rd.y*.8+.2,0.,1.));sky+=vec3(1.,.7,.3)*pow(sunDot,8.)*2.;float fog=1.-exp(-t_dist*slider_atmosphereDensity*.01);o.rgb=mix(o.rgb,sky*slider_brightness,fog);o.rgb+=vec3(1.,.9,.5)*smoothstep(.995,1.,sunDot)*10.*slider_brightness*smoothstep(50.,500.,t_dist);

sliders.name: Zoom Level
sliders.description: Adjusts the overall zoom level of the scene. Lower values zoom in, higher values zoom out.

sliders.name: Max Iterations
sliders.description: Controls the maximum number of steps the raymarcher takes. Increase this if distant objects are getting cut off.

sliders.name: Brightness
sliders.description: Adjusts the overall brightness of the scene.

sliders.name: Atmosphere Density
sliders.description: Controls the thickness of the distance fog, blending distant structures into the sunset sky color.

sliders.name: Sun Elevation
sliders.description: Controls the height of the sun in the sky, changing the atmosphere from day to sunset to night.
